format_fix_sentra_message.title: Format Fix: Sentra Message
format_fix_sentra_message.objective: Repair candidate_output into a valid sentra-message block.
format_fix_sentra_message.outputInstruction: Output exactly one top-level <sentra-message> block and nothing else.
constraints: Output exactly one top-level <sentra-message> block and nothing else.
Do not output markdown, JSON, or plain text outside XML.
Do not output sentra-tools/sentra-result/sentra-input tags.
rules: sentra-message must include route tags and valid segment structure.
At least one valid segment is required.

format_fix_sentra_tools.title: Format Fix: Sentra Tools
format_fix_sentra_tools.objective: Repair candidate_output into a valid sentra-tools block.
format_fix_sentra_tools.outputInstruction: Output exactly one top-level <sentra-tools> block and nothing else.
constraints: Output exactly one top-level <sentra-tools> block and nothing else.
Use legal invoke/parameter structure only.
Do not output sentra-message/sentra-result/sentra-input tags.
rules: Invoke must include name attribute.
Parameter must include name attribute.

format_fix_sentra_tools_or_message.title: Format Fix: Sentra Tools Or Message
format_fix_sentra_tools_or_message.objective: Repair candidate_output into exactly one valid root block: sentra-tools or sentra-message.
format_fix_sentra_tools_or_message.outputInstruction: Output exactly one top-level root: <sentra-tools> or <sentra-message>.
constraints: Output exactly one top-level root block and nothing else.
If sentra-tools is chosen, do not output sentra-message.
If sentra-message is chosen, do not output sentra-tools.
rules: Never emit both roots in one output.

format_fix_reply_gate_decision_tools.title: Format Fix: Reply Gate Decision Tools
format_fix_reply_gate_decision_tools.objective: Repair candidate_output into exactly one valid sentra-tools invoke for reply_gate_decision.
format_fix_reply_gate_decision_tools.outputInstruction: Output exactly one top-level <sentra-tools> containing exactly one invoke name=reply_gate_decision.
constraints: Output exactly one top-level <sentra-tools> block and nothing else.
Use exactly one invoke name=reply_gate_decision.
Required parameters: action, enter, reason.
If action=delay, delay_when is required and must be parseable.
Do not output <sentra-message> or any non-XML prose.
rules: action must be one of silent|action|short|delay.
enter must be boolean and consistent with action.

fewSteps.fix: emit exactly one invoke with required parameters

format_fix_override_intent_decision_tool.title: Format Fix: Override Intent Decision Tools
format_fix_override_intent_decision_tool.objective: Repair candidate_output into exactly one valid sentra-tools invoke for override_intent_decision.
format_fix_override_intent_decision_tool.outputInstruction: Output exactly one top-level <sentra-tools> containing exactly one invoke name=override_intent_decision.
constraints: Output exactly one top-level <sentra-tools> block and nothing else.
Use exactly one invoke name=override_intent_decision.
Required parameter: decision.
decision must be one of reply|pending|cancel_and_restart|cancel_only.
Do not output <sentra-message> or any non-XML prose.
rules: confidence is optional number in [0,1].
reason is optional concise string.

fewSteps.fix: choose one of allowed decision values

reply_gate_decision.title: Reply Gate Decision
reply_gate_decision.objective: Decide whether to enter main flow and output one sentra-tools invoke reply_gate_decision.
reply_gate_decision.outputInstruction: Output exactly one top-level <sentra-tools> containing exactly one invoke name=reply_gate_decision.
constraints: Output exactly one top-level <sentra-tools> block and nothing else.
Use exactly one invoke name=reply_gate_decision.
Required parameters: action, enter, reason.
action must be one of silent|action|short|delay.
If action=delay, delay_when is required and must be parseable.
Do not output <sentra-message> in this stage.
rules: enter=false iff action=silent; otherwise enter=true.
Keep reason concise and evidence-based.

override_intent_decision.title: Override Intent Decision
override_intent_decision.objective: Decide override intent and output one sentra-tools invoke override_intent_decision.
override_intent_decision.outputInstruction: Output exactly one top-level <sentra-tools> containing exactly one invoke name=override_intent_decision.
constraints: Output exactly one top-level <sentra-tools> block and nothing else.
Use exactly one invoke name=override_intent_decision.
Required parameter: decision.
decision must be one of reply|pending|cancel_and_restart|cancel_only.
Do not output <sentra-message> in this stage.
rules: confidence is optional number in [0,1].
reason should briefly cite structured summary evidence.

output.reason: user explicitly cancelled current task without replacement
new message replaces or supplements previous task objective

runtime_signal_action_decision.title: Runtime Signal Action Decision
runtime_signal_action_decision.objective: Decide one runtime action for currently running task from runtime signal.
runtime_signal_action_decision.outputInstruction: Output exactly one top-level <sentra-tools> containing exactly one invoke name=runtime_signal_action_decision.
constraints: Output exactly one top-level <sentra-tools> block and nothing else.
Use exactly one invoke name=runtime_signal_action_decision.
action must be one of cancel|supplement|replan|append|ignore.
reason must be concise and grounded in runtime objective/signal text.
confidence is optional and must be in [0,1].
rules: If uncertain between replan and supplement, prefer supplement.

output.reason: new signal adds details to current objective

tool_router_decision.title: Tool Router Decision
tool_router_decision.objective: Decide whether this turn needs tools.
tool_router_decision.outputInstruction: Output exactly one top-level block: <sentra-tools> or <sentra-message>.
constraints: Output exactly one top-level block and nothing else.
If uncertain whether tools are needed, default to sentra-message.
If sentra-tools is returned, use native XML invoke/parameter only.
If sentra-tools is returned, include only tool requests and keep invokes minimal.
If sentra-message is returned, do not mention internal workflow or protocol.
rules: Prefer sentra-message when input is insufficient or request is lightweight.

execution_path_decision.title: Execution Path Decision
execution_path_decision.objective: Choose execution path for this turn. Output sentra-tools only.
execution_path_decision.outputInstruction: Output exactly one top-level <sentra-tools> with one invoke: execution_path_decision.
constraints: Output exactly one top-level <sentra-tools> block and nothing else.
Use one invoke name=execution_path_decision.
path must be one of skills|mcp.
reasons must be typed array with concrete evidence, 1-4 items.
rules: Choose skills when sentra-message can complete request without MCP tools.
Choose mcp only when MCP tool execution is required.

reasons: User only needs direct reply; no tool side effects required.
User requested file write with explicit path, requiring tool execution.

context_summary_emit.title: Context Summary Emit
context_summary_emit.objective: Summarize XML evidence and output one structured sentra-tools call.
context_summary_emit.outputInstruction: Output exactly one sentra-tools invoke named emit_context_summary.
constraints: Output exactly one top-level <sentra-tools> block and nothing else.
Use exactly one invoke name=emit_context_summary.
Required parameters: summary, keywords, eventBoard.
Each field must use <parameter name="..."> wrapper.
Use eventBoard (camelCase), not event_board.
rules: summary must be non-empty Chinese text.
keywords and eventBoard must be typed arrays of strings.
artifacts is optional typed array of objects.
Do not output markdown, JSON fences, or extra prose.

fewSteps.fix: add parameter name=eventBoard as typed array
